_meta.description: Format-specific design rules. Every value exact. Pair with brand-tokens.json. Convention: mm partout (SSOT). Inches noted in comments only when pptxgenjs requires it.
changes_from_3.1.0: slides: bloc rewritten for LAYOUT_WIDE 16:9 (508x285.75mm). Old 4:3 254x190.5mm block was obsolete and contradicted LAYOUTS.md and Template POF XML.
slides.content_zone: x=26.7 y=50.8 max_width=454.6 max_height=223.5 mm (verified from Template POF XML).
slides.logo_zone: x=421.3 y=20.6 w=64.5 h=16.4 mm (top-right anchor verified).
slides.corner_marks: teal grpSp at TL (x=19.0 y=16.3) and BR (x=483.2 y=265.5), 7.7x7.7mm.
slides.header_bar: removed (DESIGN.md forbids full-width colored header bars under titles).
Convention unifiee: mm partout. Inches en commentaire pour pptxgenjs.
changes_from_3.2.2: Type-scale LOCKED: 7 allowed sizes only (9/11/14/18/22/26/36 pt) + stat-only (72/120 pt). Hard cap.
Weight LOCKED: regular set [300, 400, 600, 700]. ExtraBold (800) restricted to slide_title_on_cover and stat_number. Black (900) forbidden.
Gradient overlay canonique unique: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(28,31,59,0.85) 0%, rgba(28,31,59,0.45) 100%). Other gradients = brand violation.
Corner marks migrated from solid squares to L-brackets (4 orientations: TL/TR/BL/BR). 12mm size, teal stroke 5px square cap. Asset: assets/brand-elements/corner-bracket-{tl,tr,bl,br}.svg.
Mode 'final_content' documented in CONTENT-RULES.md to prevent paraphrasing of provided verbatim content.
changes_from_3.2.3: Integrated 16 chart templates in /examples/charts/ (KPI, bar, stacked, grouped, line, donut, progress, funnel, timeline, gantt, sankey, process, org, tables, radar). Maps excluded — Benoit iterating separately.
Fixed assets/icons/*.svg: stroke=currentColor (was hardcoded #1A2B4A) — enables CSS recoloring on dark/light backgrounds.
Fixed assets/icons/*.svg: hex #1A2B4A → #1C1F3B (canonical navy) — alignment with tokens.
Fixed examples/charts/styles.css: weight 500 → 600, hex #2a3147 → #1C1F3B, #3a4a66 → #435D74, #9db1c2 → #CFD9E0, #eff2f6 → #F9FCFF (canonical palette compliance).
Rewrote docs/ASSETS.md: full Notion Media Assets DB schema (11 fields), query protocol with filter combinations per use case, ranking heuristic, default values.
changes_from_3.2.4: Explicit shadow_forbidden rule on corner_marks (L-brackets). No drop-shadow, no filter, no blur, no opacity reduction, ever. Audit confirmed clean SVG assets — rule is documented for future-proofing against rendering-side injection (CSS, PowerPoint shape effects, artifact iframes).
changes_from_3.2.5: FIX: 162 icons regression — sed #1A2B4A → #1C1F3B + #80c8c3 → #80C7C2 (canonical palette restored).
ADD charts_lock block: max 1 legend per chart, palette enforcement, cross-medium constraints.
ADD maps_lock block: 5 patterns canonical, 3 region overlays canonical, anchoring rules, cross-medium constraints.
ADD docs/MAPS.md (1.0) — 5 patterns + region overlays charter.
REWRITE docs/ICONS.md (2.0) — 3 sources (curated, Tabler CDN, brand picto).
SYNC docs/ASSETS.md (3.3.0) — full Notion DB schema + Maps section.
REWRITE README.md — cross-medium philosophy + structure complete.
ADD examples/email-signatures/ — 3 entities HTML signatures Outlook+Gmail compatible.
VECTORIZE assets/maps/svg/02-07.svg — 6 regional crops now proper vector (was PNG-embedded). 4-layer structure (bg, base, overlay, fade).
Notion DB 'Design System Feedback' created (collection a3f73a10-caf3-4726-b37f-421244a9cc6f) for weekly feedback consolidation.
changes_from_3.3.0: Sync brand-tokens.css gradient overlay to canonical lock value (was 0%/58%, now 85%/45%).
Add colors.gradients.navy_depth_subtle for subtle vertical gradient on large navy bg surfaces (cover, section divider, big-number bg).

ALIGN with V2 template (Charte/Trame/Zone-utile deck V2 from 2026-04-26): add 28pt to typography_lock.allowed_sizes_pt. Loosen ExtraBold (800) restriction — now allowed on slide_title_default (any layout), in addition to cover/section/stat number.
ADD slides.max_envelope (zone utile V2 definition) — wider envelope including header zone, distinct from content_zone (after header).
Update slides.font_size_mapping with V2 hierarchy: cover_title=36pt ExtraBold, slide_title=26pt ExtraBold, slide_subtitle=26pt SemiBold, slogan=28pt SemiBold, body=22pt Regular, caption=18pt Light.
changes_from_3.3.1: FIX corner_marks.default_pair: 'top_left' only (was TL + BR). Bottom-right corner mark forbidden by default. Optional only when explicitly requested.
ADD color_hierarchy_lock: titles default = navy on light / white on dark. Teal is SECONDARY accent only, max 1-2 uses per page/slide.
ADD covers_lock: cover title 36pt MAX, subtitle 22-26pt MAX. NEVER 28pt+ for subtitle. Background = flat navy (no gradient at top — top must be darkest).
ADD back_cover_lock: default text = white on navy. Teal allowed for ONE accent element only (typically the tagline).
ADD wave_decorative_lock: wave watermark MUST be fully visible. Never clipped at slide/page edge. Position so the entire SVG is within the canvas, not bleeding out.
FIX navy_depth_subtle direction: top navy → bottom teal (was navy → lighter navy). User feedback: 'Teal vers Navy, pas Navy vers clair'.
ADD print_lock block — compact print sizes distinct from slide sizes. Body 11pt (not 22pt), H1 22pt, H2 14pt, caption 9pt italic. Aligned with Rapport v1 (validated).
CLARIFY cross-medium philosophy: identical colors/fonts/assets, but distinct sizes per medium (slide vs print vs web).
changes_from_3.3.2: SCOPE: Remove Academy and Sunu PO — POF Factories only.
TYPOGRAPHY: Add 26pt 'slide_title' to typography.scale (was missing from harmonic scale; most-used slide heading per V2).
changes_from_3.3.3: Add body_slide (22pt / 30px) and body_print (11pt / 15px) to typography.scale.
Refine typography.body_variants with 3 explicit entries (slide / print / web) — visible in Claude Design preview.
No change to slides.font_size_mapping or print_lock — values were already correct, just explicit in scale now.
changes_from_3.3.4: ADD assets/maps/svg/00-monde-cropped.svg — new master basemap (Americas + Antarctica dropped, 3 fades baked-in: top/left/bottom). 148 countries, no labels. Use as default world view for slides.
ADD maps_lock.heatmap_palettes.teal_only — 5 stops #F1FBFA → #80C7C2 → #2BA595 → #09414A. Use for Pattern 1 + R3 regional examples instead of navy palette.
ADD maps_lock.fade_rules — fade gradient must NOT overlap colored highlights (use clipPath if needed). Legends rendered LAST in z-order, never inside fade region.

ADD components.button_ghost spec — light: steel #435D74 border + text, hover #CFD9E0 bg. Dark: light-steel #5F7D95 border + text, hover white 8%. Hierarchy: Primary > Secondary > Danger > Ghost (lowest emphasis).

REFINE colors.gradients.navy_depth_subtle — direction from bottom-left corner, transition to fully transparent (not solid teal end). Final teal opacity 38% on solid navy base. Per user iterations 2026-04-27.
ARCHIVE environment icons — moved to assets/icons/_archived/environment/. Removed from active scope per user feedback. Reversible by un-archiving.
changes_from_3.3.5: Archive assets/icons/ecology/ (stroke-width 28 too thick vs Tabler outline standard).
Switch ICONS.md to Tabler CDN as primary source. POF curated icons no longer active.
Add Drive folder reference in ASSETS.md (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1oqm8Wkh_lfH4Vw4j7vBJNtoO8aji9GIn) as raw source for Notion URL fichier values.
changes_from_3.3.6: OVERLAY system formalized: 3 solid navy levels (30/60/90%) + gradient with 4 directions × 4 coverages × 2 color variants. Always ends 100% transparent.
Gradient pattern: solid hold from 0% to coverage_pct, then fade to transparent at 100%.
Removed earlier ad-hoc photo overlay gradient — replaced by overlay_system block.
REMOVED gradient_overlay_lock (single canonical) — superseded by overlay_system with 32 valid combinations.
changes_from_3.3.7: ADD overlay_system.gradient.intensity — 'full' (default, opaque hold→transparent) and 'soft' (semi-transparent 50% hold→transparent). Combinations now 4×4×2×2 = 64 valid.
changes_from_3.3.8: ADD overlay_system.gradient.intensity.medium (start_opacity 0.75) — between full (1.0) and soft (0.5). Combinations now 4×4×2×3 = 96 valid.
INTEGRATE charts/16-map.html updated, charts/17-icons.html (Tabler 106 icons), charts/18-images.html (live Notion photos) — output of Graphs & maps project test.
changes_from_3.3.9: Excel template v2: 6 sheets — Dashboard KPI / Data master / Bar / Stacked / P&L 3y with formulas / Funnel. Replaces v1 (3 sheets).

slides._verified_from: Template POF - Claude.pptx ppt/presentation.xml: cx=18288000 cy=10287000 EMU

pipe_accent.position: left of title, replaces full-width header bar

corner_marks._description: L-bracket marks at top-left and bottom-right (signature POF anchors). Migrated from solid squares in v3.2.3.

top_right._optional: Add only when symmetric framing required

bottom_left._optional: Add only when symmetric framing required

_violation_examples: placing corner mark at bottom-right (deprecated v3.3.2)
placing 4 corners (only TL allowed by default)
corner_marks.rendering_rule: Render as flat L-bracket strokes only. No depth effect of any kind. Brand mark is geometric, not skeuomorphic.

content_zone._relation_to_max_envelope: content_zone is a subset of max_envelope, positioned below the header (title + subtitle zones). Use content_zone for body content (text, images, charts). Use max_envelope only when content needs to span up into the header area (rare).

grid._note: 12 cols across 454.6mm content zone with 6.4mm gutter

slide_types.cover: Full-bleed photo + navy gradient overlay + logo top-right + title center-left + subtitle below
slide_types.section_divider: Full-bleed photo + dark overlay + section number + title white centered
slide_types.content_image: 50/50 split: text left (content zone), full-bleed image right
slide_types.value_proposition: Header bar + 3 equal-width content cards below
slide_types.process_flow: Header bar + numbered steps with 0.5pt navy arrow connectors
slide_types.table: Header bar + borderless table with alternating fills
slide_types.team: Header bar + circular portrait grid (3-4 per row)
slide_types.timeline: Horizontal timeline with navy line + teal dots + dated milestones
slide_types.callout_quote: Large centered quote, Poppins SemiBold, teal left border
slide_types.closing: Same as cover treatment with contact info overlay

max_envelope._description: Maximum content envelope per V2 template (Charte deck V2). Includes the header zone (logo, title, subtitle). Use this as the absolute max bounding box. For body content placement, use content_zone (after header).
max_envelope._verified_from: Charte Trame deck V2.pptx slide 'zone utile' (uploaded 2026-04-26)

body._note: body_print = 11pt for DOCX/PDF. body_screen = 12pt for web/slides.

teal_80C7C2._warning: Outside standard CMYK gamut. Expect slight desaturation. Test print required.

odoo_class_mapping._note: 5 combos mapped to 4 schemes (dark_alt merged into dark with variant flag).

text_overlay_rules.contrast_enforcement: All text must meet WCAG AA for large text (3:1 minimum).

typography_lock._description: Hard cap on font sizes and weights. Any value outside these lists is a brand violation and must be flagged in QA.
typography_lock._rationale: Visual cohesion across deck/web/print requires bounded type system. Inflation of sizes/weights = perceived brand fragmentation.
typography_lock._qa_check_command: grep -oE 'font-size:[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?pt' file.html | sort -u  -- result must be subset of allowed list

charts_lock._description: Format rules for charts in examples/charts/ and any newly-generated chart asset.
forbidden: auto color schemes from chart libraries

maps_lock._description: POF cartographic system. Source of truth: assets/maps/pof-world-map-blank.svg.

4_data_dots.label_inside: Raleway Bold white, font_size = clamp(9pt, r/3, 18pt)

forbidden: map floating centered with whitespace on all sides
shadow / drop-shadow / blur on any element

T1_teal_only.use: Teal-only — Pattern 1 section header + R3 regional Indian Ocean. NO navy.

fade_rules._description: White fade (type_1_white_fade) must not cover colored country highlights or data dots. Use clipPath excluding colored geometry, OR position fade only on side(s) without colored elements.
fade_rules.legend_z_order: top — always rendered LAST in SVG, never inside fade region
fade_rules.fade_start_at_viewbox_edge: Fade gradient START coordinate must coincide with viewBox edge, not start inside the visible area
fade_rules._note_stop_opacity: Use stop-opacity=1.0 (fully opaque at edge). Never 0.95 or other partial values.

world_map_defaults.top: Always active — stops at North Africa latitude (~37°N). Prevents Europe from appearing cut.
world_map_defaults.left: Always active — stops at West Africa coast. Prevents Americas edge artifact.
world_map_defaults.bottom: Optional — activate only when South America or Antarctica edge is raw
world_map_defaults.right: Optional — activate only when East Asia/Pacific edge is raw

fade_rules.cumulation: Multiple sides allowed simultaneously on maps (type_1_white_fade only)

color_hierarchy_lock._description: Titles default colors. Teal is SECONDARY accent only, never primary title color.

title_default._rationale: Teal as title color = visual fragmentation. Navy on light / white on dark = institutional readability.

allowed_for: decorative pipe accent left of title
stat number on dark bg only
data series in chart palette (series 4+ extended)
forbidden_for: all text in back cover (use white default)

_violation_examples: every body page title in teal (should be navy)
back cover with all text in teal (should be white default)
subtitle in teal when no other emphasis exists (use navy/white)

covers_lock._description: Cover slides (deck L01) and report covers (DOCX/PDF) — strict size and bg rules.

cover_title._note: Teal forbidden for cover title — too dominant.

cover_subtitle._forbidden_size: 28pt+ for subtitle on cover (V2 charte slogan 28pt is for slogan, not subtitle — different role)

cover_bg._rationale: Navy depth gradient (180deg #1C1F3B → #25284A) makes top of cover too pale. User feedback 2026-04-26: 'Bleu navy trop clair en haut'. Flat navy keeps the institutional weight.
cover_bg._alternative: If gradient required, must INVERT direction so top is the darkest stop. But default = flat navy.

cover_wave_decorative._violation: wave watermark clipped at edge (user feedback 2026-04-26: 'Filigrane vague coupé')

back_cover_lock._description: Back cover (4ème de couverture) on navy bg.
back_cover_lock._rationale: User feedback 2026-04-26: éviter tout le texte en teal. Default white on navy.

teal_allowed.typical_use: tagline accent OR website URL OR one strategic word
teal_allowed._example: Logo white centered + Address white + Tagline 'Recycling factories. Local impact.' SemiBold 18pt teal italic.

back_cover_lock._forbidden: all text (logo subtitle + address + email + tagline) in teal

wave_decorative_lock._description: Wave watermark from assets/brand-elements/wave-{teal,white}.svg must be fully visible on canvas.
wave_decorative_lock._recommendation: Place wave so its full bounding box fits inside the page (with at least 5mm margin from any edge).

print_lock._description: Print A4 size hierarchy. Distinct from slides (which use bigger sizes for screen readability at 3m). Print is for paper, read at 25cm — compact.
print_lock._cover_exception: Cover title up to 36pt allowed even on print

overlay_system._description: POF overlay system. Three canonical types only. All previous solid_uniform and 96-combination gradient system is superseded.

type_1_white_fade._usage: Map edges only — never on photos

rules.edge_flush: 100% opacity must coincide with viewBox/slide edge
rules.no_legend_overlap: Never fade over legends — legends rendered last in z-order, above all fades
rules.minimize_colored_zone_fade: Position fade on sides without colored country highlights
rules.no_raw_edge: Never cut a map edge without at least minimal fading

world_map_defaults.top: Always active — stops at North Africa latitude (~37°N)
world_map_defaults.left: Always active — stops at West Africa coast

type_2_navy_hard._usage: Photos — strong text zone, navy dominant
type_2_navy_hard.css_layer2_teal_flair: radial-gradient(circle at bottom left, rgba(128,199,194,0.40) 0%, transparent 50%)
type_2_navy_hard.css_combined: layer2 stacked on top of layer1

half.use: Strong text zone, photo half visible

rules.exclusive: Only ONE position at a time — no cumulation
rules.teal_anchor: Teal flair always anchored at bottom-left, no other position

half.use: Text zone, photo still clearly readable

rules.exclusive: Only ONE position at a time — no cumulation
rules.contrast_check: Verify WCAG AA minimum contrast before placing text on top

_forbidden: Non-axial directions (45deg etc.) — only 4 cardinal directions
Any intensity level not matching the 3 types above
